properties.name: Tab state
properties.description: The state of a tab. Only one tab can be active at a time.

properties.name: Tabs
properties.description: The tab text and a reference to its associated content (content or link)
properties.constraint: Only tab item components are allowed

table.name: Tab group
table.description: The horizontal container that houses all individual tabs together. It organizes the tabs in a row and a line that runs along the bottom.

table.name: Active tab indicator
table.description: A visual element that appears beneath the currently selected tab. Only one tab can ever be active at a time.

table.name: Tab text
table.description: The label displayed within each tab that describes the content it represents. This text should be concise and clearly indicate what content will be shown when selected.

table.name: Tab
table.description: An individual clickable element that acts as a trigger to display its associated content panel. Each tab represents a distinct section of related content.
